title: CrossĂ˘Â€Â“Data Center Hierarchical Consensus Scheme with Geo-Aware Leader Election
abstract: One or more processors execute the instructions to receive, via the network interface, a write request from a client device; send, via the network interface, the received write request to a set of follower devices; receive, via the network interface, a first acknowledgement from a majority of the follower devices of the set of follower devices that the write request was processed; send, via the network interface, the received write request to a set of peer devices; receive, via the network interface, second acknowledgements from a majority of the set of peer devices that the write request was processed; and send an acknowledgement of the write request to the client device in response to the receipt of the first acknowledgements and the second acknowledgements.
